commands.review_summary:
The PR drops replayable OpenAI/Codex reasoning blocks when the latest outbound user turn contains image content and adds focused sanitizer regression tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. Source inspection and the linked issue make the failure path plausible: current main can replay paired OpenAI reasoning while the latest user turn is converted to a Responses image input.
